common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to upload images and support different business scenarios through business and scene parameters.

common_error_list.name: error_limit

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit

common_error_list.description: no timestamp.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is expired.

common_error_list.name: error_partner_key_expired
common_error_list.description: Your API partner key has expired, please reset the Live API Partner Key in Console to get a new valid partner key to call open api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_permission

request_params.description:
Defines the business type of the uploaded image. Supported values: 

2 = Returns
request_params.name: business

request_params.description:
Defines the purpose of the uploaded image under the specified business type. Supported values:

- If business = 2 (Returns): 1 = Return Seller Self Arrange Pickup Proof Image
request_params.name: scene

request_params.description:
The image files to be uploaded. Rules and restrictions by business and scene:

- If business = 2 (Returns) and scene = 1 (Return Seller Self Arrange Pickup Proof Image): Up to 3 images can be uploaded. Each image must not exceed 10MB. Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG.
request_params.name: images

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

response_params.description: Indicate warning message you should take care.
response_params.name: warning

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/media/upload_image?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => array('images'=> new CURLFILE('/path/to/file') /* Replace with actual file path */),
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: multipart/form-data'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

curl --location --request POST 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/media/upload_image?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp' \
--form 'images=@"/path/to/file"'  #replace the sample path with your file path
